news.headline: Florida National Guard Battalion Performs First Minuteman Rotation
news.summary: Florida National Guardsmen trained alongside the 82nd Airborne Division during a Joint Readiness Training Center rotation, marking the first time a guard unit has integrated into such a rotation under the new minuteman rotation concept.
